elmwood-court.description: A renovated 1960s walk-up two blocks from Elmwood's market square. Modernised suites, secured entry, and a resident manager on site — on a quiet street that still puts the grocer, the library, and the tram stop within a ten-minute walk.

alder-house.description: Purpose-built rental in the Birch Quarter, finished to a higher standard than the street around it. Open-plan suites, in-suite laundry, and secured underground parking, with a landscaped courtyard at the centre of the building.

harbour-view.description: A newer building a single street back from Harbourton's working quay. Bright suites with high ceilings, most with water views, and a sheltered bicycle room by the entrance for the commute along the seawall.
